description_long: This object is a compact chainsaw featuring a robust, cylindrical yellow motor housing with a prominent brown wrap-around handle for secure grip and maneuverability. The cutting bar is relatively short and black, with a visible chain running along its edge, suitable for light to medium-duty cutting tasks. A long black power cord extends from the rear, indicating it is electrically powered, and the cord is flexible for ease of movement. The handle is ergonomically designed, positioned above and to the side of the motor, allowing for both vertical and horizontal operation. The chainsaw includes a visible safety guard in front of the handle, providing protection for the user's hand. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and durable plastic, with some exposed fasteners and mechanical details.
description: A compact, yellow and black electric chainsaw with a wrap-around handle, short cutting bar, and a long power cord. Features a visible safety guard and ergonomic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yellow motor housing, brown wrap-around handle, and the power cord extending downward.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full length of the black cutting bar and chain, with the power cord trailing behind.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the handle and the narrow profile of the motor housing, with the chain and bar edge-on.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view displaying the underside of the cutting bar, chain, and the attachment point of the power cord.
attribute_handle_design: Single large wrap-around handle, brown, positioned above and to the side of the motor housing, ergonomically shaped for secure grip.
